summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of the contabilidade informational site (PT/EN/ES). All 16 requested features verified successfully on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) viewports. Home, About, Services (with anchors), Blog list + detail, Recruitment, Contactos, contact form submission, language switching + persistence, header dropdown, mobile drawer, footer and social icons all working. data-testids present on every interactive element per spec.

issues: Radix Dialog a11y warning: SheetContent missing DialogTitle/Description. Console shows 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle for the component to be accessible for screen reader users.' Wrap a hidden title via VisuallyHidden to remove warning (non-blocking, accessibility nicety).

action_items: Optional: add VisuallyHidden <SheetTitle> + description inside mobile menu SheetContent to silence Radix a11y console warning (non-blocking).

Optional: Blog page currently shows 1 featured + 3 grid cards (total 4). If the spec strictly counts only grid cards via data-testid='blog-card-*', the featured card has a different testid; confirm naming convention is intentional.
critical_code_review_comments: Header.jsx is 315 lines and mixes desktop nav, dropdown, mobile drawer, and lang switcher; consider splitting into DesktopNav / MobileDrawer / LangSwitcher subcomponents.

Social links in Footer point to hardcoded https://facebook.com / instagram.com / linkedin.com root domains instead of company profile URLs - placeholders are acceptable for an info site but should be parametrised in a config (matches Reis&Reis placeholder convention).
SheetContent in Header lacks an accessible title; add a visually-hidden title to satisfy Radix a11y contract.
Backend untouched (only hello-world endpoints); contact form success appears to be client-side only - confirm intended behaviour (no persistence).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL: https://business-hub-814.preview.emergentagent.com. All data-testids match spec: hero-title, lang-{pt|en|es}, nav-services-trigger, nav-service-{general|tax|hr|consulting|audit|startup}, nav-services-all, mobile-menu-trigger, mobile-menu-sheet, mobile-nav-*, mobile-service-*, mobile-lang-*, form-{name|email|phone|subject|message|submit|success}, footer-social-{facebook|instagram|linkedin}. localStorage key for language is 'site_language'. Blog slugs verified: alteracoes-fiscais-2026, plus 3 others. Servicos hash anchors (#general,#tax,#hr,#consulting,#audit,#startup) all present in DOM.
